jcr:content.jcr:description: AbbVie develops innovative medicines and therapies so patients can live more fully. Learn more about our immunology research to address chronic diseases.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Immunology | AbbVie
jcr:content.cardDescription: More than 1 million people with immune-mediated diseases worldwide are treated with our therapies.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: A trusted leader dedicated to transforming the lives of people with immune-mediated diseases, today and tomorrow.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: We’re building on our deep expertise and historic legacy in immunology research to explore new disease areas, create a more patient-centric discovery and development process, and offer solutions for more diverse patient populations. Our advanced technologies support a rich pipeline of medicines for some of the most challenging immunological diseases.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Understanding drivers of disease<br>Increasing understanding of disease through molecular profiling of patient samples, exploring preclinical disease to post-treatment states and using multi-omics, machine learning and artificial intelligence.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Fit for purpose drug discovery <br>Redesigning drug discovery using molecular profiles that reveal the genetic makeup of disease rather than diagnoses that describe disease.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Increasing probability of success in drug discovery <br>Developing more humanized preclinical model systems (e.g., CRISPR, iPSC, organoids and disease-on-a-chip) and state-of-the-art immunological, imaging and computational approaches to drive innovation of target identification, validation, benchmarking and prioritization.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Inducing of immune tolerance<br>Increasing understanding of disease through molecular profiling of patient samples, exploring preclinical disease to post-treatment states and using multi-omics, machine learning and artificial intelligence.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Drug delivery platforms <br>Investing in targeted drug delivery platforms, which are designed to specifically deliver a potent drug to the right cells and/or tissues. These include bispecifics, Antibody-Drug Conjugate platforms, small molecule approaches, RNA therapeutics and in situ cell reprogramming.

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: Bringing discoveries from the Lab to Life

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Learn more about the experience of living with hidradenitis suppurativa and hear from AbbVie scientists about our efforts to address patients’ needs.

accordion_item.name: Accordion Item
accordion_item.text:
We are committed to transforming therapies for diseases affecting joints, muscles and<br> ligaments. With high medical needs still present in this area, there’s more to be done to <br>deliver solutions for patients.

Rheumatic Disease Focus

Rheumatoid Arthritis (RA)

  • This chronic, autoimmune and inflammatory disease can cause pain, stiffness, swelling<br> and loss of joint function. RA can cause tissue damage that can lead to chronic pain, lack<br> of balance and physical deformities.

Psoriatic Arthritis (PsA)

  • PsA is a chronic disease that can cause inflammation in the joints, tendons and/or<br> ligaments. It affects about 30 percent of people who have psoriasis. The impact on<br> quality of life is similar to RA, but PsA often lacks resources for ideal diagnosis,<br> symptoms, treatment and research into the disease understanding.

Spondyloarthritis (SpA)

  • SpA comprises arthritic conditions that affect the spine and joints, including ankylosing<br> spondylitis and axial spondyloarthritis.

Axial Spondyloarthritis (axSpA)

  • A chronic, inflammatory condition, axSpA consists of two subsets that have been<br> clinically defined as ankylosing spondylitis (AS) and non-radiographic<br> axial spondyloarthritis (nr-axSpA). AS is an inflammatory disease that causes bones in<br> the spine to fuse over time, and it is more common in men than women. Nr-axSpA is a<br> chronic inflammatory disease, causing inflammation of tissues within the spine and<br> resulting in swelling, stiffness and pain. Signs of nr-axSpA can be difficult to test, often<br> resulting in delays in diagnosis.

Uveitis (UV)

  • This group of eye diseases is characterized by inflammation of the uvea, the middle layer<br> of the eye. Early diagnosis and treatment are important as uveitis can be serious, leading<br> to permanent vision loss.

Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE)

  • The most common type of lupus, especially among women, this immune-mediated<br> disease is associated with inflammation of multiple organ systems.

Juvenile Idiopathic Arthritis (JIA)

  • JIA is the most common chronic rheumatic disease in childhood. For patients living with<br> JIA, early diagnosis and treatment are critical.

accordion_item_1041470658.name: Accordion Item
accordion_item_1041470658.text:
We strive to uncover new answers and improve the standards of care for people facing<br> immune-mediated skin diseases, especially those that can be challenging to diagnose and<br> treat.

Dermatology Focus

Psoriasis (PsO)

  • This chronic disease of the immune system triggers skin inflammation and causes skin<br> cells to be produced faster than normal, forming the thick, red, itchy, flaky patches known<br> as plaques. People with psoriasis can experience negative impacts on mental health and<br> well-being, including shame, anger and worry, as well as difficulties with daily activities<br> that can impact their quality of life.

Atopic Dermatitis (AD)

  • A chronic, inflammatory disease, AD is characterized by intense itching, oozing and<br> crusting, redness, skin erosion and dry skin. Beyond the skin, AD can have a holistic<br> impact on patients’ lives due to sleep disturbances, decreases in work productivity, and<br> mental health effects that patients may face, especially during flare-ups, which can lead<br> to low energy levels and decreased quality of life.

Psoriatic Arthritis (PsA).

  • A type of inflammatory arthritis that triggers joint pain, stiffness and swelling. About 30<br> percent of people with psoriasis also develop psoriatic arthritis

Hidradenitis Suppurativa (HS)

  • A chronic, inflammatory disease, HS can be challenging to diagnose and, as a<br> progressive disease, can increase in severity over time with irreversible skin damage and<br> unbearable pain.

accordion_item_196537957.name: Accordion Item
accordion_item_196537957.text:
We continue to explore new frontiers in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). Through innovative research and development, we aim to create an even brighter future for people with other disorders, including those of the stomach and intestines

Gastroenterology Focus

Crohn’s Disease (CD)

  • A chronic, inflammatory bowel disease, CD is characterized by inflammation of any part<br> of the gastrointestinal tract. Symptoms vary from person to person and often fluctuate<br> between active flare-ups and remission.

Ulcerative Colitis (UC)

  • Characterized by inflammation of the large intestine, UC is a chronic, inflammatory bowel<br> disease. Symptoms range from mild to severe but may make it difficult to keep to a usual<br> routine.

teaser.description: Across disease areas and development stages, we follow 3 tenets to drive innovation forward.
teaser.name: Teaser
teaser.title: Innovation strengths

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Strategic collaborations bring together the brightest minds in immunology working to bring more options to patients, faster. We join forces with partners that complement our strengths, capabilities and commitment to people with immune-mediated diseases.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Innovation in this area helps researchers understand complex immune-mediated diseases, from how a person’s genetics affect disease to leveraging clinical trial data to deliver personalized medicine. Advanced technologies like molecular profiling and biomarker analyses allow us to dig even deeper.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: We have nearly a quarter-century of experience in immune-mediated disease, and we’re not stopping. We continue to investigate diseases with critical unmet diseases, building robust development programs that advance how the disease is treated.

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: Interested in a fast-paced career in science?

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Help us create the future of medicine.

cta.aria-label: Explore Jobs Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta
